summary: Phase 2 Favorites Testing Complete - Backend 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend favorites feature fully functional with heart toggles on recipe pages and cards, guest login redirect, optimistic updates, empty state, and multilingual support (EN/IT/FR tested). Fixed missing heart button on editorial variant recipe cards in Explore page.
critical_code_review_comments: FavoriteButton has proper optimistic update with revert on error
Guest users get {favorited: false} from favorite-status (not 401) - correct behavior
Duplicate favorites are idempotent (no error, returns success)
Favorites nav link conditionally shown when user is logged in
Translations complete for favorites section in EN/IT/FR/ES/DE
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user phase1final@test.com and recipe spaghetti-alla-carbonara-italy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Favorites complete. All endpoints tested: POST/DELETE /recipes/{slug}/favorite (auth required), GET /recipes/{slug}/favorite-status (returns false for guests), GET /users/me/favorites (auth required). Frontend heart buttons visible on recipe pages and cards. Guest clicking heart redirects to login with redirect parameter. Favorites persist and display correctly on /favorites page.

backend_favorites_api.TestFavoritesAuth: 4/4 passed - add/remove/my_favorites require auth, favorite_status returns false for guests
backend_favorites_api.TestFavoritesCRUD: 7/7 passed - add, status_true, idempotent, my_favorites_contains, remove, status_false, my_favorites_empty
backend_favorites_api.TestFavoritesPersistence: 1/1 passed - favorite persists after multiple status checks

frontend_favorites_ui.Guest /en/favorites: PASS - Shows login prompt with data-testid='favorites-login-prompt'
frontend_favorites_ui.Italian /it/favorites: PASS - All translations present: 'Accedi per salvare i preferiti', 'Crea un account'
frontend_favorites_ui.French /fr/favorites: PASS - All translations present: 'Connectez-vous pour sauvegarder des favoris'
frontend_favorites_ui.Recipe page heart button: PASS - data-testid='favorite-btn-{slug}' visible next to title
frontend_favorites_ui.Explore page heart buttons: PASS - 50 favorite buttons visible on recipe cards (after fix)
frontend_favorites_ui.Guest heart click redirect: PASS - Redirects to /login with redirect parameter
frontend_favorites_ui.Empty state: PASS - Shows 'No favorites yet' with Explore Recipes button
frontend_favorites_ui.Add favorite flow: PASS - Heart fills, recipe appears on favorites page with count badge

verified_features: POST /api/recipes/{slug}/favorite adds to favorites (returns 401 for guests)
DELETE /api/recipes/{slug}/favorite removes from favorites (returns 401 for guests)
GET /api/users/me/favorites returns list of favorited recipes (returns 401 for guests)
Duplicate favorite is idempotent (no error, returns {success: true, favorited: true})
Frontend: Heart button visible on recipe page (data-testid='favorite-btn-{slug}')
Frontend: Heart button visible on recipe cards in explore page (fixed editorial variant)
Frontend: /en/favorites shows login prompt for guests
Frontend: /en/favorites shows empty state when no favorites
Frontend: Favorites nav link appears when logged in (heart icon in nav)
Frontend: Guest clicks heart redirects to login with redirect parameter
Frontend: Optimistic update - heart fills immediately, reverts on error

fixes_applied.RecipeCard editorial variant: Added FavoriteButton to editorial variant (was missing, only default variant had it)
